name: quan
description: Static site (Cloudflare Pages, no build step). This package.json exists only so Cloudflare Workers Builds can install @cloudflare/puppeteer + wrangler to bundle and deploy the Barchart auto-pull Worker (workers/barchart-fetch.js). The Pages project has no build command, so it ignores this. `latest` keeps the wrangler + puppeteer pair mutually compatible; pin once a known-good pair is confirmed.
